description_long: This bungalow features a white stucco exterior with a flat roof and multiple rectangular windows, giving it a Mediterranean or Spanish Colonial Revival appearance. The structure is two stories tall, with the upper floor set back, creating a stepped profile. The front area includes a covered porch with terracotta tiles, surrounded by lush landscaping with palm trees and shrubs. A small swimming pool and lounge area are visible on one side, while the other side features a courtyard with additional greenery and a central fountain. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, and the overall layout emphasizes outdoor living spaces integrated with the building. The property is set on a tan, open lot, suggesting a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood context.
description: A white, two-story Mediterranean-style bungalow with a flat roof, terracotta-tiled porch, lush landscaping, and a small pool, featuring asymmetrical windows and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, covered porch, central courtyard with fountain, and lush landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the terracotta-tiled porch, grouped windows, and the pool area partially visible behind palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back facade with multiple windows and the pool area, as well as the stepped two-story structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focuses on the pool, lounge area, and the rear entrance, with visible landscaping and palm trees.
